---
title: "HBS University Expansion Design Note"
author: "Research Team"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  docx:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(knitr)
})

root_dir <- normalizePath("..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
module_dir <- root_dir
table_dir <- file.path(module_dir, "tables")

read_csv_safe <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
}

read_md_safe <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return("File not available.")
  }
  paste(readLines(path, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n")
}

linkage_summary <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  read_csv_safe(file.path(module_dir, "linkage_diagnostics_18_24.csv")),
  read_csv_safe(file.path(module_dir, "linkage_diagnostics_22_30.csv")),
  read_csv_safe(file.path(module_dir, "linkage_diagnostics_25_35.csv"))
)
merge_coverage <- read_csv_safe(file.path(module_dir, "merge_coverage_by_year_region.csv"))
outcome_checks <- read_csv_safe(file.path(module_dir, "outcome_maturity_checks.csv"))
stability_comparison <- read_csv_safe(file.path(module_dir, "residence_stability_sample_comparison.csv"))
model_status <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_status.csv"))
model_coefficients <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_coefficients.csv"))
model_descriptive <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_descriptive_comparisons.csv"))
model_b_gate <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_b_gate_status.csv"))
model_a_direction <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_a_direction_review.csv"))
model_a_region_sensitivity <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_a_region_sensitivity.csv"))
model_a_cell_balance <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_a_cell_balance_summary.csv"))
model_a_year_stability <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_a_year_stability.csv"))
model_a_sample_profile <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "model_a_sample_profile_comparison.csv"))
outcome_candidate_year_audit <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "outcome_candidate_year_audit.csv"))
outcome_candidate_summary <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "outcome_candidate_summary.csv"))
sample_year_support_trace <- read_csv_safe(file.path(table_dir, "sample_year_support_trace.csv"))
```

## Scope

This note documents a separate exploratory HBS design audit for the university-expansion question. It does not modify or replace the frozen LiTS main paper.

## Data Audit

{{< include ../cohort_definition_note.md >}}

## Linkage Diagnostics

```{r}
if (nrow(linkage_summary) == 0) {
  cat("Linkage diagnostics were not available at render time.")
} else {
  linkage_view <- linkage_summary %>%
    select(
      age_window,
      eligible_sample_n,
      linked_sample_n,
      link_rate,
      linked_to_mother_rate,
      linked_to_father_rate,
      usable_parent_proxy_share,
      max_abs_region_share_gap,
      materially_better_than_old_pooled
    )
  knitr::kable(linkage_view, digits = 3)
}
```

## Merge Coverage

```{r}
if (nrow(merge_coverage) == 0) {
  cat("Merge coverage output was not available at render time.")
} else {
  merge_view <- merge_coverage %>%
    group_by(survey_year) %>%
    summarise(
      regions = n_distinct(admin_region),
      person_n = sum(person_n, na.rm = TRUE),
      matched_current_n = sum(matched_current_n, na.rm = TRUE),
      current_merge_coverage = sum(matched_current_n, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(person_n, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  knitr::kable(merge_view, digits = 3)
}
```

## Outcome Readiness

```{r}
if (nrow(outcome_checks) == 0) {
  cat("Outcome-maturity checks were not available at render time.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(outcome_checks, digits = 3)
}
```

## Outcome Harmonization Audit

{{< include ../outcome_harmonization_audit.md >}}

```{r}
if (nrow(sample_year_support_trace) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Sample Year Support Trace\n")
  knitr::kable(sample_year_support_trace, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(outcome_candidate_summary) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Outcome Candidate Summary\n")
  knitr::kable(outcome_candidate_summary, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(outcome_candidate_year_audit) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Outcome Candidate Audit By Year\n")
  knitr::kable(outcome_candidate_year_audit, digits = 3)
}
```

## Residence-Stability Pass

```{r}
if (nrow(stability_comparison) == 0) {
  cat("Residence-stability comparison output was not available at render time.")
} else {
  stability_view <- stability_comparison %>%
    select(
      sample_name,
      sample_n,
      effective_link_rate,
      immigrant_share,
      exposure_region_ambiguity_share,
      ambiguity_reduction_vs_full,
      cell_median_n,
      cell_share_ge_10,
      overall_pass
    )
  knitr::kable(stability_view, digits = 3)
}
```

## Design Readiness

{{< include ../design_readiness_note.md >}}

## Harmonization Notes

{{< include ../harmonization_notes.md >}}

## Linkage Failure Modes

{{< include ../linkage_failure_modes.md >}}

## Exploratory Estimation

```{r}
if (nrow(model_status) == 0) {
  cat("Model-status output was not available at render time.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(model_status, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(model_descriptive) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Model A\n")
  knitr::kable(model_descriptive, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(model_coefficients) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Model B and Model C Coefficients\n")
  knitr::kable(model_coefficients, digits = 3)
}
```

## Model A Review Gate

{{< include ../model_a_review_note.md >}}

```{r}
if (nrow(model_b_gate) == 0) {
  cat("Model A review-gate output was not available at render time.")
} else {
  knitr::kable(model_b_gate, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(model_a_direction) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Direction Review\n")
  knitr::kable(model_a_direction, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(model_a_region_sensitivity) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Region Sensitivity\n")
  knitr::kable(model_a_region_sensitivity, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(model_a_cell_balance) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Cell Balance Summary\n")
  knitr::kable(model_a_cell_balance, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(model_a_year_stability) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Year Stability\n")
  knitr::kable(model_a_year_stability, digits = 3)
}
```

```{r}
if (nrow(model_a_sample_profile) > 0) {
  cat("\n### Sample Profile Comparison\n")
  knitr::kable(model_a_sample_profile, digits = 3)
}
```
